text:
There’s a girl named Alice. Alice loves going to the library. Every weekend her favorite trips are just her and a book.

One day Alice discovers a book called Starship Eggs. She thinks it’s the coolest thing ever.

Later that month, Alice convinces some friends to go visit a planet like the one described. Despite being skeptical, her friends are excited.

Upon arrival they embark on an adventure exploring their new exotic world. They discover a magnificent towering tree filled with enormous, brightly glowing eggs.

Alice eagerly picks one up. It’s huge! It starts glowing brighter!

They touch it softly. Suddenly stars come raining down. They laugh uncontrollably.

Later that night stars twinkled brightly just like the eggs. The friends realized it was a real encounter. They took countless photos.

When they got home, they framed the most beautiful thing.

Alice’s favorite story now wasn’t just about books. It was about them.

Every morning Alice would promise herself another story adventure. And every star
